proguard.evaluation.executor

Class MethodExecutionInfo

  • java.lang.Object
    • proguard.evaluation.executor.MethodExecutionInfo

  • public class MethodExecutionInfo
extends java.lang.Object
    This class stores data relevant to modeling the execution of a method and offers methods to extract additional information.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      MethodExecutionInfo(AnyMethodrefConstant anyMethodrefConstant, CodeLocation caller)
      Constructs a MethodExecutionInfo.
      MethodExecutionInfo(Clazz clazz, Method method, CodeLocation caller)
      Constructs a MethodExecutionInfo.
      MethodExecutionInfo(ConcreteCall call)
      Constructs a MethodExecutionInfo.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.Optional<CodeLocation> getCaller()
      Get the code location of the call site
      java.util.Optional<AnalyzedObject> getCallingInstance(Executor executor, ReferenceValue instanceValue)
      Get the calling instance using the copy behavior defined by the executor.
      java.util.Optional<AnalyzedObject> getCallingInstance(Executor executor, Value[] parameters)
      Get the calling instance using the copy behavior defined by the executor.
      java.util.Optional<java.lang.String> getInstanceType(ReferenceValue instanceValue)
      Get the type of the instance.
      java.util.Optional<ReferenceValue> getInstanceValue(Value instance)
      Get the ReferenceValue of the instance.
      java.util.Optional<ReferenceValue> getInstanceValue(Value[] parameters)
      Get the reference value of the instance.
      java.util.Optional<java.lang.Object> getObjectId(ReferenceValue instanceValue)
      Get the object ID for the instance value.
      Clazz getResultClass()
      Get the result class of the method.
      java.lang.String getResultType()
      Get the result type of the method.
      MethodSignature getSignature()
      Get the method signature of the method
      boolean isConstructor()
      Return whether the method is a constructor.
      boolean isStatic()
      Return whether the method is static.
      boolean returnsSameTypeAsInstance(ReferenceValue instance)
      Return whether the return and instance types of the method match.
      boolean returnsSameTypeAsInstance(Value instance)
      Return whether the return and instance types of the method match.
      boolean returnsSameTypeAsInstance(Value[] parameters)
      Return whether the return and instance types of the method match.

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • MethodExecutionInfo

        public MethodExecutionInfo(Clazz clazz,
                           Method method,
                           CodeLocation caller)
        Constructs a MethodExecutionInfo.
        Parameters:
        clazz - The referenced class.
        method - The referenced method.
        caller - The code location of the call site. May be null.

      • MethodExecutionInfo

        public MethodExecutionInfo(AnyMethodrefConstant anyMethodrefConstant,
                           CodeLocation caller)
        Constructs a MethodExecutionInfo.
        Parameters:
        anyMethodrefConstant - A method reference constant. Requires referenced class to be initialized (using ClassReferenceInitializer).
        caller - The code location of the call site. May be null.

      • MethodExecutionInfo

        public MethodExecutionInfo(ConcreteCall call)
        Constructs a MethodExecutionInfo.
        Parameters:
        call - the concrete call.

    • Method Detail

      • getSignature

        public MethodSignature getSignature()
        Get the method signature of the method

      • getCaller

        public java.util.Optional<CodeLocation> getCaller()
        Get the code location of the call site

      • isConstructor

        public boolean isConstructor()
        Return whether the method is a constructor.

      • isStatic

        public boolean isStatic()
        Return whether the method is static.

      • getResultClass

        public Clazz getResultClass()
        Get the result class of the method. If the method is a constructor, this will be the class of the instance.

        This is the result class as declared in the invoked method constructor, method execution might provide a more specific runtime type.

      • getResultType

        public java.lang.String getResultType()
        Get the result type of the method. If the method is a constructor, this will be the type of the instance.

        This is the result type as declared in the invoked method constructor, method execution might provide a more specific runtime type.

      • getInstanceValue

        public java.util.Optional<ReferenceValue> getInstanceValue(Value instance)
        Get the ReferenceValue of the instance.

      • getInstanceValue

        public java.util.Optional<ReferenceValue> getInstanceValue(Value[] parameters)
        Get the reference value of the instance.

      • getObjectId

        public java.util.Optional<java.lang.Object> getObjectId(ReferenceValue instanceValue)
        Get the object ID for the instance value.

      • getCallingInstance

        public java.util.Optional<AnalyzedObject> getCallingInstance(Executor executor,
                                                             Value[] parameters)
        Get the calling instance using the copy behavior defined by the executor.

      • getCallingInstance

        public java.util.Optional<AnalyzedObject> getCallingInstance(Executor executor,
                                                             ReferenceValue instanceValue)
        Get the calling instance using the copy behavior defined by the executor.

      • getInstanceType

        public java.util.Optional<java.lang.String> getInstanceType(ReferenceValue instanceValue)
        Get the type of the instance.

      • returnsSameTypeAsInstance

        public boolean returnsSameTypeAsInstance(Value[] parameters)
        Return whether the return and instance types of the method match.

      • returnsSameTypeAsInstance

        public boolean returnsSameTypeAsInstance(Value instance)
        Return whether the return and instance types of the method match.

      • returnsSameTypeAsInstance

        public boolean returnsSameTypeAsInstance(ReferenceValue instance)
        Return whether the return and instance types of the method match.
